title: DragNSounds API
description: A simple API to upload custom sounds or music to the server and let them play in realtime to any player at any position without the need for a resourcepack.
body: DragNSounds is a simple Minecraft library mod that makes it possible to provide custom sounds on the server side and allow every player to hear them anywhere without resource packs. The API uses Minecraft's native sound engine and allows you to upload your own sounds to the server, as well as manage the uploaded files and manipulate sounds during playback with new features. Once added to your own project, the API can be used very easily through a few simple methods. The library can also be used as a standalone mod using the built-in commands, although the options are very limited then. ## 🧩 Dependencies * Version `>= 0.2.2` requires [DragonLib](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/dragonlib) to be installed! Older versions `<= 0.2.1` do **NOT** require DragonLib! Delete it from your mods folder. [Please read this post to see which versions of my other mods are compatible with each other](https://mrjulsen.net/mods/dragonlib/docs/blog/2026/03/01/dragonlib-3-compatibility/). #### Other dependencies used by this project * [JAVE2](https://github.com/a-schild/jave2) for audio management ## 📕 Documentation and other information If you need help, please read the [Documentation](https://misterjulsen.github.io/DragNSounds-API/) or visit our Discord server. [![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/YnDoeHs.png)](https://discord.gg/AeSbNgvc7f) ## 🤗 Contribute to this project Feel free to help with development and translation by creating pull requests or issues on GitHub. ## ⚠️ Please note! To protect your worlds, you should always create a backup before installing an update of this mod. Alpha versions in particular may contain critical bugs! I am not responsible for any damage caused to your worlds by this mod if you ignore this warning!
